title: Department Manager Vacancy at Decathlon India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Decathlon India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Department Manager with drive and ambition, Decathlon India in Jabalpur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Decathlon India:
Decathlon India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Customer Service

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Referral bonus program
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Decathlon India!
